name: Sisters Minun & Plusle
description:
The Cheering Pokémon, Electric types.

#1 - Minun and Plusle hanging out in User's backyard.

#2 - Lounging on the cat tree.

#3 - Plusle enjoys a nap on User's lap while they watch TV. Minun is bravely monitoring the outside world from the top of the cat tree.
